**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Changzhou Yuejin Automotive Accessories Co., Ltd. is an operational, micro-scale legacy township enterprise. Despite severe raw data shifting (where historical names like 'Wujin Zhenglu Auto Parts Factory' populated the industry field, and the business scope was pushed into 'other_email'), forensic extraction confirms its true nature. Established in 1988 in the historical Zhenglu township (now Tianning District, Changzhou), it is officially misclassified as an 'Automobile Complete Vehicle Manufacturer'. However, its verified scope strictly involves the basic manufacturing and mechanical processing of auto parts and accessories. Unlike completely dormant shells, the corrected data shows it maintains a micro-workforce of 16 insured employees (2024), utilizing its historical 1.18 million RMB paid-in capital to function as a Tier-3/Tier-4 hardware processing workshop within the regional automotive supply chain.
